user_motivation: Memory attention is not memory retrieval. MemoSelect identifies boundary-aware internal-memory selector heads whose selected memory tokens are future-reusable, and uses them to guide fixed-budget streaming video KV cache eviction.
special_requirements: Do not claim semantic head roles.
Do not present SparseMM visual-head scores as the main method.
All experiment claims must be supported by local result files.
MemoSelect results are pending until top/random/bottom selector experiments are run.
